title: agropyron intermedium var. microstachyum
intro: Agropyron intermedium var. microstachyum, also known as intermediate wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Agropyron intermedium var. microstachyum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve its leaves and roots being dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption.
